meta.title: Embir: Free Inclusive Dating App for Every Orientation | Worldwide
meta.description: Join Embir, the free-at-launch dating app open worldwide for every orientation. Verified profiles, deep compatibility matching, human moderation and a safer community.

landing.title: Free Inclusive Dating App for Every Orientation
landing.subtitle: Free at launch worldwide. Verified profiles, deep compatibility and a safer community for every orientation before the freemium transition.
landing.founder_strip: Founder access · Welcome to my world · Deep compatibility
landing.card_join_text: Join the founding community before Embir becomes freemium.
landing.markets_focus_uk: London, Manchester, Birmingham and urban communities
landing.markets_focus_us: New York, Los Angeles, Miami and early coastal demand
landing.markets_focus_ch: Zurich, Geneva, Lausanne and border regions
landing.proof_1_text: Embir is not a swipe app. Profiles are immersive personal universes where you express your true self through visuals, preferences and lifestyle.
landing.proof_2_text: Core access starts free so the first members can build the community before paid options arrive.
landing.proof_3_text: Embir is for adults across orientations, identities and dating intentions, with clearer preferences from day one.
landing.proof_4_text: Discovery is shaped by orientation, preferences, intent, and behavioral compatibility instead of swipe volume alone.
landing.proof_5_text: Verification, reporting, moderation and privacy controls are part of the product foundation.
landing.proof_6_text: The future freemium model will be transparent and fund safety, moderation, mobile apps and algorithms.
landing.founder_cta_text: Free at launch. Built for every orientation. Designed around immersive personal universes, deep compatibility, verified profiles and a safer community culture.
landing.why_embir_title: Why Embir changes the game in 2026
landing.why_embir_1_text: Every member can verify their profile with a selfie. The verified badge builds trust from day one — no bots, no catfishing.
landing.why_embir_2_text: Discovery is driven by orientation, preferences, intent and compatibility — not endless swiping. Less noise, more meaningful connections.
landing.why_embir_3_text: Embir is built for adults across all orientations: straight, gay, lesbian, bi, trans, queer and anyone seeking clearer, more respectful dating.
landing.why_embir_4_text: Human moderation, visible reporting, zero tolerance for harassment. Safety is not an add-on — it's the product foundation.
landing.how_works_step1_text: Express yourself through your immersive profile: orientation, preferences, lifestyle, intentions. No rigid boxes, no irrelevant fields.
landing.how_works_step2_text: Discovery is guided by real compatibility, not just distance. Verified profiles appear first.
landing.how_works_step3_text: Free messaging, verified profiles, respectful community. You control who can contact you and how.
landing.faq_home_a1: Yes. Embir is free throughout the launch phase. Core features — profile, discovery, messaging, compatibility — are accessible at no cost. The future freemium model will be transparent and fund safety, moderation and mobile apps.
landing.faq_home_q2: Is Embir only for one orientation?
landing.faq_home_a2: No. Embir is built for adults across all orientations: straight, gay, lesbian, bi, trans, queer. Orientation and preferences are configurable at signup without being locked into a box.
landing.faq_home_q3: How does Embir reduce fake profiles?
landing.faq_home_a3: Selfie verification, human moderation, visible reporting and a design that prioritizes community quality over artificial volume. Every report is reviewed by a real person.
landing.faq_home_q4: How is Embir different from Tinder or Bumble?
landing.faq_home_a4: Embir focuses on deep compatibility and verified profiles instead of endless swiping. No essential features locked behind a subscription from day one. An approach centered on trust, transparency and real inclusivity.
landing.faq_home_q5: Which countries is Embir available in?
landing.faq_home_a5: Embir is available worldwide on the web. The strongest early communities may grow city by city, but founding members can join from anywhere. The public experience currently supports English and French.
landing.trust_1_text: Every report is reviewed by a real team member, not an algorithm. Context matters and decisions are made with judgment, not automation.
landing.trust_2_text: Harassment, hate speech and abusive behavior result in immediate and permanent bans. The community matters more than growth metrics.
landing.trust_3_text: Selfie verification is available from day one. Verified profiles are clearly marked so you know who you're talking to.
landing.trust_4_text: You control who can see your profile, contact you and interact with you. Privacy is built into the product, not bolted on after.

footer.tagline: International dating platform for all orientations, available worldwide. Free at launch, with compatibility-first discovery and safety tools.

invite.title: Invite your friends
invite.description: Share Embir with your friends and grow the community.
